title: STOP Using Claude Code Without This Fable 5 Agentic OS
summary: Chase AI presents a tutorial on building an agentic OS using Claude Code. The video covers architecture, memory, and observability configuration to maximize Claude Code efficiency, with practical guidance on skills customization.
writeup: This Chase AI tutorial walks through building an agentic operating system on top of Claude Code, covering architecture, memory, and observability configuration. The focus is on setup choices that improve Claude Code efficiency, including how skills are customized. Takeaways center on structuring memory and observability so agentic workflows can be configured and monitored rather than run with default settings.
